title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: The Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Why'd you ask me to enter this
race?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why? Isn't that just in your head?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Still... for some reason, I signed off on this...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: What?! No way! Daiwa Scarlet's here?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wasn't she going for the Tiara tour?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Okay, seriously, why am I here?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, right.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Now, Miss Vodka. As we know, you've decided to
run in this year's Derby.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Reaction has been mixed, I think it's fair to say.
Plenty of fans are excited to see you go pursue a
new goal—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And plenty of others just think I'm running away.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: It seems you're aware of the controversy, then.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Of course. They've said it to my face.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
"It makes no sense." "You're just scared of taking
on the Tiara finals."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, if they think they're gonna convince me to
give up on the Derby, then they're dead wrong.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This race is what inspired me to enter Tracen
Academy in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All the racers fired up, none of them backin'
down... I felt like I'd been struck by a bolt of
lightning when I first saw it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It was that cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I knew there and then that I wanted to run that
track one day, inspirin' others like they inspired
me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna show everyone watching something
only I can do. A coolness that only I have.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think that's a wonderful goal. However, it
does raise one big question.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
If you were planning on entering the Derby, why
did you run in the Oka Sho rather than the
Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's because there was someone there who
seemed interesting.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to run against her and see if I was right.
Nothin' more, nothin' less.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why am I running away from her?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm supposed to be the number one Umamusume,
but I'm being totally lame right now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I've got to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
There's no way around it. I'll beat her and become
number one.
